---
title: "Unpleasing Unprofessional Spider"
authors:
  - name: "Unknown"
  - name: "AlexanderWeigel"
    url: "https://github.com/AlexanderWeigel"
  - name: "KaMittelbach"
    url: "https://github.com/KaMittelbach"
authors_links: "Unknown, [AlexanderWeigel](https://github.com/AlexanderWeigel), [KaMittelbach](https://github.com/KaMittelbach)"
rank: 4
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="group_unpleasing_unprofessional_spider_screencast.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Facebook_Präsentation.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
